subsidized Part D coverage. There are 12 monthly variables — where the 01 through 12 at the end of 
the variable name correspond with the month (e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December). 

There is a late enrollment penalty for those who are eligible for Part D but choose not to enroll for any 
given year and do not have creditable coverage for that time. A number of
